response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13 years of professional experience post-2012, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced AI-related degree, and no evidence of strategic advisory work with enterprise customers or technical thought leadership at the Principal/Director level.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: Falls short of the 15-year requirement and lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope or influence
No recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or advanced AI degree as preferred
No evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI platform strategy at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC scope
